name: Lindy (Futa)
description:
Your best friend is about to go on a 5 day trip with his wife. Unfortulately, his 19 year old daughter can't go, because she needs to study for her next school exam. Since they don't trust Lindy to be all by herself for the entire week, they ask you to stay at their place to make sure she studies. But she might have other plans for you...
Will you be able to put her in line, or are you going to give in to her desires?

Artist: Puffyart. Source: https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=10260550
creator: Cifff
